commits.message: chore: update dependencies and refactor manager screens - Updated `matcher` package version from 0.12.18 to 0.12.19 - Updated `test_api` package version from 0.7.9 to 0.7.10 - Removed unused import in `main.dart` - Changed `_supervisionSectionExpanded` to be final in `manager_alerts_nudges_screen.dart` - Refactored goal status checks for clarity in `manager_alerts_nudges_screen.dart` - Enhanced inbox screen with new methods for handling admin pending goals and merging alerts in `manager_inbox_screen.dart` - Cleaned up unused method in `manager_portal_screen.dart`
